# checkCircuit

> Check if spending exceeds circuit breaker thresholds

## Inputs

| Parameter | Type | Required |
|-----------|------|----------|
| db | Database | yes |
| config | CircuitBreakerConfig | yes |

## Steps

```mermaid
graph TD
  A[dailySpend: call getDailySpend]
  A --> B[monthlySpend: call getMonthlySpend]
  B --> C[checkDaily: condition]
  C --> D[checkMonthly: condition]
  D --> E[ok: return]
```

## Output

Type: `CircuitStatus`
